a:r.a:t: Manual triage, shift coverage, repetitive routing
Incident resolution, RCA writing, change documents
Manual regression, release validation, test scripts
Owns PHTN.ai ops, model training, automation health monitoring
SLA governance, incident command, client relationship management
AI-generated test coverage, release risk assessment and sign-off
AI-assisted requirements, OKR reporting, trend analysis for stakeholders
model reshapes teams — from executors to orchestrators. AI handles volume. People handle judgment.
